overall.description: A nighttime drive through a futuristic cyberpunk city with neon-lit skyscrapers, holographic advertisements, and wet streets reflecting vibrant lights. The footage showcases the dense urban commercial district from Cyberpunk 2077, featuring towering buildings with massive digital billboards and elevated highway structures.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a city corner with yellow barriers and a red brick building on the left. The camera moves forward through a wet intersection with prominent crosswalk markings, approaching a commercial district with towering digital billboards visible in the distance against the night sky.

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right at the intersection, passing a yellow taxi while approaching a massive circular building adorned with a giant holographic billboard featuring a blue-haired character. The elevated highway structure becomes visible in the distance as the scene transitions toward a more enclosed urban corridor.

segments.scene_description: Driving beneath the massive elevated highway, the camera moves through a semi-covered corridor defined by thick yellow support beams. The lighting shifts to a mix of neon and artificial sources, with a prominent red neon sign visible on a building to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial street with digital advertising towers

segments.scene_description: Emerging from under the highway, the camera turns onto a main commercial thoroughfare lined with towering digital advertising towers and glass skyscrapers. A white utility truck is parked along the left sidewalk as the camera continues down the wet, neon-reflecting street toward the distant city center.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive from a quiet city corner into the heart of a dense, neon-drenched commercial district. It begins at a wet intersection beside a red brick building and yellow barriers, moving forward through crosswalk markings toward towering digital billboards in the distance. As the camera turns right past a yellow taxi, the view opens up to a massive circular building featuring a giant holographic blue-haired character before the environment tightens into an enclosed urban corridor. The scene then shifts beneath a massive elevated highway, passing through a semi-covered space defined by thick yellow support beams and red neon signage. Finally, the camera emerges from under the highway onto a main thoroughfare lined with glass skyscrapers and advertising towers, gliding past a parked white utility truck along a street reflecting the vibrant lights of the city center.
